case_title: UHG I, LLC VS. ANGELA DENMAN ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT [C.C.P. 858] AND [C.C.P 1033(2)] (TRANSACTION ID # 67004409) FILED BY PLAINTIFF UHG I, LLC
NOTICE OF CHANGE OF FIRM NAME AND ADDRESS (TRANSACTION ID # 75501302) FILED BY ATTORNEY RAICHELSON, MICHAEL H.
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SACRAMENTO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT DENMAN, ANGELA

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF UHG I, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT DENMAN, ANGELA DOES 1 TO 100 NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAY-17-2021
DISASSOCIATION OF ATTORNEY, AND NOTICE OF NEW COUNSEL OF RECORD (TRANSACTION ID # 75501302): RAICHELSON, MICHAEL H. REMOVED AS ATTORNEY FOR UHG I, LLC
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF AUG-02-2022 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 67870467)
SUMMONS ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF UHG I, LLC

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, COURT JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $445.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 67004409) AS TO DEFENDANT DENMAN, ANGELA

DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 67004409) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 100
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR AUG-02-2022 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF UHG I, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DENMAN, ANGELA $10,012.60 PRINCIPAL, $445.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,457.60, SEE SCANNED DOC
